name: Why Love Why: The Series
overview: Two straight men named Benjo and Emil were assigned to be thesis partners by their professor. Emil, being not financially capable to do online research reluctantly agreed to stay in Benjo’s affluent penthouse unit. When a couple turned positive to COVID-19, the building where Benjo’s penthouse was situated was locked down for a month, paving the way for Benjo and Emil’s sexual awakening.

trailers.title: WHY LOVE WHY THE SERIES OFFICIAL TRAILER | PHILSTAGERS FILMS WITH ENGLISH SUB
